summary: Iteration 201 Architect's Workshop module testing complete. All 26 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: /workshop route loads with 4 tabs (Sacred Geometry, Golden Ratio, Resonance, Materials), all 5 Platonic solid cards, 8 material cards, golden ratio calculator with nested divisions, harmonic oscillation with nodes/antinodes, and inverse square law calculator showing ~103 dB. Navigation has 'Architect's Workshop' link under Explore menu. Brand cleanup verified: 'Cosmic Resonance Bar Kit' replaced 'Positive Energy Bar'. Mastery regression tests pass.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 201 Architect's Workshop module fully working. (1) Backend endpoints: GET /api/workshop/platonic-solids returns 5 solids (tetrahedron, hexahedron, octahedron, dodecahedron, icosahedron) with structural data and Euler's formula. GET /api/workshop/materials returns 8 materials (water, sand, glass, steel, wood_oak, concrete, copper, crystal) with density and speed_of_sound. GET /api/workshop/constants returns universal constants (phi, pi, e, gravity, speed_of_sound, planck, schumann). POST /api/workshop/golden-ratio calculates major/minor segments and nested divisions. POST /api/workshop/harmonic-nodes calculates nodes/antinodes for vibrating string. POST /api/workshop/inverse-square calculates dB SPL with falloff curve. (2) Frontend: /workshop route with 4 tabs (data-testid='workshop-tab-solids', 'workshop-tab-golden', 'workshop-tab-harmonics', 'workshop-tab-materials'). Sacred Geometry tab shows 5 solid cards (data-testid='solid-{id}'). Golden Ratio tab has input (data-testid='golden-ratio-input') and result (data-testid='golden-ratio-result'). Resonance tab has harmonic slider (data-testid='harmonic-slider'), harmonic result (data-testid='harmonic-result'), inverse square inputs (data-testid='isq-power-input', 'isq-distance-input'), and result (data-testid='isq-result'). Materials tab shows 8 material cards (data-testid='material-{id}'). (3) Navigation: 'Architect's Workshop' link under Explore menu (data-testid='nav-item-workshop'). (4) Brand cleanup: 'Positive Energy Bar' renamed to 'Cosmic Resonance Bar Kit' in science_history.py line 50. (5) Mastery regression: GET /api/mastery/tier and POST /api/mastery/progress still work.

workshop_endpoints.GET /api/workshop/platonic-solids: Returns 5 solids with faces, edges, vertices, element, frequency_hz, structural_note, construction_use
workshop_endpoints.GET /api/workshop/materials: Returns 8 materials with density, speed_of_sound, resonance_note, color
workshop_endpoints.GET /api/workshop/constants: Returns phi, pi, e, gravity, speed_of_sound, planck, schumann with values and descriptions
workshop_endpoints.POST /api/workshop/golden-ratio: Returns major/minor segments and nested divisions up to depth 5
workshop_endpoints.POST /api/workshop/harmonic-nodes: Returns nodes, antinodes, frequency, wavelength for given harmonic and length
workshop_endpoints.POST /api/workshop/inverse-square: Returns dB SPL and falloff curve for given power and distance

navigation.explore_menu: Architect's Workshop link (data-testid='nav-item-workshop') under Explore dropdown
